First off, its an active cheaper motel and everything that is implied comes with it. People walking around near the truck all hours. I woke up to a random filled shopping cart not 10 feet from the front of my truck. Also, there is no signage anywhere stating its a truck parking club location. Other than that, property has good pavement and plenty of room to maneuver your semitruck. Its cheap enough that I would stay again if need be.

This area is in a remote place,  away from the city. It was quiet and I slept good on my 10 hr break. Hotels and restaurants in walking distance. Owner stopped by and was super cool.

IYKYK! Baton Rouge has some bad crime, but not here! If you want a safe place, this is it!  When I arrived there were 4 Local Cop cars here! Made my Spidey Sences go ballistic. However, after visiting with 2 of the towns finest, I learned this is where they hang out especially if its a slow night. (I arrived+- 0230). If its a busy night they said they are still in there every few hours. Sweet!!!Any ways, the access to the lot is very easy and unencumbered. Super quiet and safe.I hope this helps yall on your travels. BTW, its only like 9 miles away from AGHappy Trails yall
